examples.spanish: Y aprovéchame hoy, que mañana me voy
examples.english: And take advantage of me today, 'cause tomorrow I'm leaving

examples.spanish: Aprovéchame hoy, que obliga'o no me vuelve' a ver (Ey, ey)
examples.english: Take advantage of me today, you won't see me again by obligation (Ey, ey)

examples.spanish: Chequéate las babie', diablo, mami, qué dulce
examples.english: Check out the babes, damn, mommy, so sweet

examples.spanish: Ey, chequéate el AP, nunca se va de hora
examples.english: Hey, check the AP, it never goes off time

examples.spanish: Chequéate lo' Billboard, llevo número uno doce mese' (Ey, ey, ey, ey)
examples.english: Check the Billboard, I've been number one for twelve months (Ey, ey, ey, ey)

examples.spanish: Chequéate los número' y verás que son facts (Dile)
examples.english: Check the numbers and you'll see they're facts (Tell 'em)
